_comment: EvolvX v1.1 UI — no new npm dependencies required.

_existing_deps_used.recharts: Already in NOFX — used for AreaChart, BarChart
_existing_deps_used.swr: Already in NOFX — used for all data fetching
_existing_deps_used.tailwindcss: Already in NOFX — all styling via utility classes

_font.note: Optional: add JetBrains Mono for number rendering. Add this to web/index.html <head>:

_tailwind_config.note: Optional: add fontFamily override to tailwind.config.js for better mono rendering

web/src/components/evolvx/ui.tsx   — shared primitives: badges, cards, buttons, modals
